LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COMPLAINT IS BARRED BY THE "HOME RULE" DOCTRINE. (SEE DIMON V. COUNTY OF LOS ANGELES, (2008) 166 CAL.APP.4TH 1276; CURCINI V. COUNTY OF ALAMEDA (2008) 164 CAL.APP.4TH 629.) (PREVAILING PARTY SUBMITTED A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Jonathan C. Rolnick, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3815, for defendant CCSF;
No other appearance.

RULING: The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained without leave to amend. The Complaint is barred by the "home rule" doctrine. (See Dimon v. County of Los Angeles, (2008) 166 Cal.App.4th 1276; Curcini v. County of Alameda (2008) 164 Cal.App.4th 629.) (Prevailing party submitted a proposed order to the court.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
